mapper.insert: /* TM_ECS_INTN_SCRIN_Dao_insertScrinMng */ INSERT INTO tm_ecs_intn_scrin ( scrin_id, intn_sys_div_cd, scrin_nm, scrin_url, scrin_dc, hpcm_file_nm, pge_no, hpcm_vido_file_nm, use_yn, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id, parm_vu ) VALUES ( #{scrinId}, #{intnSysDivCd}, #{scrinNm}, #{scrinUrl}, #{scrinDc}, #{hpcmFileNm}, #{pgeNo}, #{hpcmVidoFileNm}, #{useYn}, SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId}, #{parmVu} )
mapper.update: /* TM_ECS_INTN_SCRIN_Dao_updateScrinMng */ UPDATE tm_ecs_intn_scrin SET intn_sys_div_cd = #{intnSysDivCd}, scrin_nm = #{scrinNm}, scrin_url = #{scrinUrl}, scrin_dc = #{scrinDc}, hpcm_file_nm = #{hpcmFileNm}, pge_no = #{pgeNo}, hpcm_vido_file_nm = #{hpcmVidoFileNm}, use_yn = #{useYn}, last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, last_updusr_id = #{lastUpdusrId}, parm_vu = #{parmVu} WHERE scrin_id = #{scrinId}
mapper.select: /* TM_ECS_INTN_SCRIN_Dao_selectScrinInfo */ SELECT A.scrin_id, A.scrin_nm, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tm_ecs_intn_menu WHERE scrin_id = A.scrin_id ) AS menu_cnt FROM tm_ecs_intn_scrin A WHERE A.scrin_id = #{scrinId}
/* TM_ECS_INTN_SCRIN_Dao_selectScrinConditionInfo */ SELECT A.parm_vu FROM tm_ecs_intn_scrin A WHERE A.scrin_id = #{scrinId}

/* TM_ECS_INTN_SCRIN_Dao_selectLnkSys */ SELECT scrin_id, scrin_nm, scrin_url, parm_vu, menu_id, menu_nm, popup_yn, call_parm, #{usrId} AS usr_id FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, A.scrin_id, A.scrin_nm, A.scrin_url, A.parm_vu, B.menu_id, B.menu_nm, B.popup_yn, B.call_parm FROM tm_ecs_intn_scrin A, tm_ecs_intn_menu B WHERE A.scrin_id = B.scrin_id(+) AND A.intn_sys_div_cd = B.menu_sys_div_cd AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.intn_sys_div_cd = #{intnSysDivCd} AND B.menu_sys_div_cd = #{intnSysDivCd} AND A.scrin_id LIKE '%' || #{scrinId} || '%' ) WHERE rn = 1

/* TM_ECS_INTN_SCRIN_Dao_retrieveHpcm */ SELECT A.menu_id, A.menu_nm, A.scrin_id, ( SELECT hpcm_file_nm FROM tm_ecs_intn_scrin WHERE intn_sys_div_cd = 'ECS' AND use_yn = 'Y' AND scrin_id = A.scrin_id ) AS hpcm_file_nm, ( SELECT pge_no FROM tm_ecs_intn_scrin WHERE intn_sys_div_cd = 'ECS' AND use_yn = 'Y' AND scrin_id = A.scrin_id ) AS pge_no FROM tm_ecs_intn_menu A WHERE A.menu_sys_div_cd = 'ECS' AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.menu_id != 'ECS000000' AND A.popup_yn = 'N' ORDER BY A.menu_ordr, A.scrin_id
